messages.text:
Here's a simple flowchart for a login page process. It outlines the steps a user goes through when logging in. 

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[Start] --> B{User Input}
    B -->|Valid Credentials| C[Access Granted]
    B -->|Invalid Credentials| D[Access Denied]
    D --> E[Show Error Message]
    E --> B
    C --> F[Redirect to Dashboard]
    F --> G[End]
```

Let me know if you need more details or a specific part explained! 😊💻
